parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6", max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are a professional blog post QA editor. Analyze the numbered blog post and identify ALL issues: grammar, spelling, tone, clarity, factual accuracy, structure, formatting. Return ONLY a JSON array (no markdown fences) where each element has: {\"line_range\": [start, end], \"issue_type\": \"grammar|spelling|tone|clarity|structure|formatting\", \"description\": \"brief description\"}. Be thorough." }, { role: "user", content: "Numbered blog post to review:\n\n" + $json.numberedContent }], temperature: 0.2 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6", max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are a professional blog post editor. Receive a numbered post and QA issues. Return ONLY a JSON array of patch objects (no markdown, no explanation). Each patch: {"line_range": [start_line, end_line], "operation": "replace|insert_after|delete", "new_text": "replacement (omit for delete)"}. Line numbers must be valid (1 to N), patches must not overlap." }, { role: "user", content: "Numbered blog post:

" + $json.numberedContent + "

QA Issues to fix:
" + JSON.stringify($json.issues, null, 2) }], temperature: 0.1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ message: "AI QA edit: " + $json.validPatches.length + " patches applied, " + $json.skippedCount + " skipped", content: $json.updatedContentB64, sha: $json.sha, branch: "main" }) }}

assignments.name: reason
assignments.value: No valid patches returned by editor agent

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: "Reset demo post to original (intentional issues)", content: "", sha: $json.sha, branch: "main" }) }}
